  "claims": [
    "Donald Trump is attempting to rig the rules of democracy to maintain Republican control in Congress.",
    "California Democrats are committed to defending democracy against attempts perceived as threats to free and fair elections.",
    "Redistricting in California is conducted through an independent commission to ensure fair play and transparency.",
    "There are concerns that mid-decade redistricting is being used for political gain by national Republicans.",
